release_notes: v1.4.1+16: Fixed in-app review system bugs, improved Rate App to deep-link Play Store, and improved usage stats custom date range display.
features: Rate App now deep-links directly to the Play Store review page.
Usage statistics custom date range now displays the actual start and end dates instead of a duration.
fixes: Fixed in-app review falsely marking users as having reviewed the app.
Fixed operator precedence bug in review trigger guard condition.
Removed false Thank You state from Rate App card that appeared without user rating.
